output.final_deliverable:
1. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page
   Link text/title: Main Page
   Description: The Main Page of Wikipedia serves as the project's front page, offering featured content, news, and links to key portals and navigation resources.

2. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Contents
   Link text/title: Contents
   Description: The Contents page organizes Wikipedia's articles by subject area and provides links to portals, featured content, and indexes.

3. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Current_events
   Link text/title: Current events
   Description: The Current events portal summarizes and links to articles about recent news and ongoing global events.

4. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Random_article
   Link text/title: Random article
   Description: The Random article link opens a randomly selected Wikipedia article, useful for exploration and discovery.

5. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Featured_content
   Link text/title: Featured content
   Description: The Featured content portal highlights exemplary Wikipedia pages, including featured articles, images, and lists.

6. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:About
   Link text/title: About Wikipedia
   Description: The About page explains Wikipedia's mission, history, editorial model, and how volunteers contribute to the encyclopedia.

7. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Contact_us
   Link text/title: Contact us
   Description: The Contact us page provides ways to get in touch with Wikipedia volunteers and the Wikimedia Foundation for feedback or support.

8. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:CreateAccount
   Link text/title: Create account
   Description: The Create account page allows users to register an account on Wikipedia to edit, create pages, and participate in the community.

9. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Community_portal
   Link text/title: Community portal
   Description: The Community portal is a hub for editors, featuring news, project pages, and resources for contributing to Wikipedia.

10. URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:WhatLinksHere/Main_Page
   Link text/title: What links here
   Description: The What links here special page lists all Wikipedia pages that link to the Main Page, useful for tracking inbound links.

Summary: I visited Wikipedia's Main Page and extracted 10 links with their URLs, visible link text/titles, and brief 1–2 sentence descriptions summarizing each target page.
output.action_summary: Collected 10 links from Wikipedia Main Page with URLs, link text/titles, and short descriptions. If you want the exact anchor positions or additional links, I can extract more or return the HTML snippet showing these links.

25d98479-5290-4427-8286-4cda97deffb1.title: Go to the Wikipedia main page (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page) and collect 10 links from the page. For each link, provide: the link URL, the link text/title, and a brief description (1-2 sentences) of what the page is about. Organize the results clearly.
